content.en:
Under Ye Tian's curious gaze, Kun Wu Supreme said: "The forces of the twelve universe epochs don't lack many resources, and besides, their numbers are too small, the resources are definitely enough. Therefore, it is impossible to attract those sons of the era with some resources and treasures, but there is one thing that the sons of the era must want very much!"

Ye Tian did not interrupt the words of the Kunwu Supreme and continued to listen to the Kunwu Supreme speaker.

Kunwu Supreme continued: "Ye Tian, you have once fought the battle of luck, you should know more about the battle of luck, many cosmic clans in the universe have fought the battle of luck within the clan, and use luck to cultivate one or two sons of the universe. Luck is very important, and you have the luck of the immortals, even if you don't have the identity of the children of the universe, or even suppressed by the universe, but just with the luck of the immortals and the luck of the human race, it is enough to make up for the suppression of the universe, and it is still luck like a rainbow! But the sons of the twelve universe epochs have no luck in this universe era, and they are suppressed by the universe far beyond your imagination, although they can still exert their combat power, but the cultivation path is difficult, and it takes countless resources and time to grow up. Of course, even so, they will still not lack resources, but if they can greatly improve their luck, I believe they will definitely be willing to go!"

"Boost your luck?"

Ye Tian somewhat understood the thoughts of the Supremes.

I saw Kunwu Supreme said again: "This time, all the races in the universe want to have a battle of the Ten Thousand Worlds Divine Son!"

"The Battle of the Ten Thousand Worlds Divine Son?" Ye Tian said curiously: "Kunwu Supreme, could it be that this is to gather the geniuses of all races together, hold a battlefield similar to the situation of the Battle of Luck, and cultivate the most genius Divine Son?"

"That's good!" Kun Wu Supreme nodded, "Actually, a long time ago, some of the Great Universe Clans united to hold the Battle of the Divine Sons of the Ten Thousand Worlds, but the scope did not affect the entire Universe Clan. Once the Battle of the Ten Thousand Worlds Divine Son is opened, a large number of geniuses will be put into the Ten Thousand Worlds composed of 10,000 worlds, and they will be killed from the layers of worlds and promoted to the higher level worlds step by step. In the end, the few people who gathered the strongest luck fought in the highest world, and the winner was the god son of all worlds, who gathered a huge amount of luck on his body, which helped to break a certain limit limit. "

"Kunwu Supreme, wouldn't this be cheaper for those Era Sons? Once they gathered a lot of Qi Luck, wouldn't it make them progress quickly?" Ye Tian asked.

"It's true that those sons of the era are cheaper, but if those sons of the era want to really grow, 100,000 years is not enough, so what we are really worried about is those supremes. Reporting this plan for the Divine Son of the Ten Thousand Worlds is also for you to catch one or two Sons of the Ages and interrogate them. In the Battle of the Divine Sons of the Ten Thousand Worlds, those Supremes are unable to rescue the Children of the Era, otherwise they will break the rules, and there will be no hindrance to what you can do in the Ten Thousand Worlds. If we are in the outside world, we dare not make a move against the children of the era, otherwise it will easily cause disputes. "

Kunwu Supreme Dao.

"I see!" Ye Tian nodded, and then said, "Okay, I'm willing to join this plan." However, in this way, it will also offend those supremes!"

"That's okay, after all, we signed an agreement with each other, as long as we don't break the agreement, they don't dare to be too presumptuous! Besides, even if one or two of them loses one or two sons of the era, they may not dare to fight to the death with us, just like the gods and demons have also lost their Henggu-level highnesses and supreme-level highnesses, and even lost a Tianzun, but they don't dare to make trouble, so you can rest assured!" Kunwu Supreme said.

"Good!"

Ye Tian was relieved, and after he went back, he silently waited for the notice of the Kunwu Supreme.

It didn't take long for the news of the Ten Thousand Races Divine Son Project to be publicized, and naturally it also reached the ears of the forces of the twelve universe eras.

All of a sudden, the incident caused a huge ripple.

The Lord of the Ancient Age, the Supreme of Golden Light, the Lord of the Underworld and other supreme beings held a meeting.

"The Ten Thousand Worlds Divine Son Project will help our Sons of the Era quickly accumulate luck, so that they can quickly increase their power, and even get rid of the restrictions of the universe one step ahead of us, this is a once-in-a-lifetime opportunity!"

"At this juncture, the ten thousand races of this cosmic era have started such a plan to play with the god son of the world, could it be aimed at us?"

"I think it may be aimed at us, to be precise, against those sons of the era and Supreme Highnesses on our side!"

"Could it be that they want to extract some information from the mouths of those sons of the era and their Supreme Highnesses, hehe, it's really ridiculous. With the genius quality of this cosmic era, can you also compete with our son of the era?"

"There are indeed no geniuses in this cosmic era, but that galaxy level called Ye Tian is indeed good, although it is impossible to compare with the top son of our era, but it must also be taken seriously!"

"You just say, do you want those juniors to participate, if you participate, there will definitely be many benefits, but there is also a trace of risk. "

"Let them choose for themselves, in fact, they don't know much, even if it is leaked, it will not affect our overall plan, as long as you don't leak it!"

"Okay, then inform them, as for whether they go or not, it's up to them!"

......

Thereupon.

These Supremes informed the Sons of the Ten Thousand Worlds Divine Son Project to the Sons of the Era and the Supreme Highnesses.

Some of the Children of the Era were not interested, while others showed great interest and expressed their desire to participate.

In the blink of an eye, a year has passed.

this day.

At the junction of the Protoss and the Demons, a huge world of ten thousand worlds appeared, which was a ten thousand worlds established by all races in the universe, and its defensive power was enough to defend against the blow of the top supreme.

This Ten Thousand Worlds alone consumes a lot of resources, but for that plan, these resources are nothing.

this day.

The galaxy-level geniuses of all races in the universe have come to this Ten Thousand Realms one after another.

And Ye Tian and the supremes of the human race also came here!

It didn't take long for many geniuses from all races in the universe to come, but Ye Tian glanced at it and found that the strength levels of these geniuses were uneven, and some of the universe's famous galaxy levels did not come.

Obviously, those cosmic clans didn't want their own geniuses to sacrifice innocently, so they only sent some cosmic sons with decent strength.

Of course, the first-grade Eternal Highness and the invincible Eternal Ancient Highness's combat power of the Galaxy level are also here.

As for His Royal Highness, Ye Tian didn't see any of them.

Rumble!!!!

Streams of powerful luck came from far away.

Ye Tian's eyes narrowed, and he said secretly: "Those people are here!"
